title: lasianthus cyanocarpus var. inaequalis
intro: Lasianthus cyanocarpus var. inaequalis, also known as a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, is a type of shrub native to Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Lasianthus cyanocarpus var. inaequalis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory health, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Lasianthus cyanocarpus var. inaequalis typically involve boiling its leaves and stems in water to make a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application.
